# To re-render manually (from cyrillic-reference/):

#                --output svg/Serif/uc/04CB.svg \
#                --font <path>/pt-serif-expert_regular.ttf

fontSize 1100
labelFontSize 200
fillColor FFFFFF
drawBackground
fillColor 000000

# ------- unicode box
strokeWidth 20 # for unicode box
strokeColor 9E9E9E # gray
drawRectangle pen 0 1440 1400 -900 stroke
# ------- glyph: Ӌ
comment "Cyrillic Capital Letter Khakassian Che uni04CB"
glyphMode fill
drawGlyph pen 382 0 /uni04CB
# ------- unicode label
drawLabel pen 700 -800 center "U+04CB"
move 1400
